use_cases: Displaying freelance or agency project listings with pricing and status indicators
Showcasing portfolio items with expandable details and category tags
Presenting job or gig marketplace entries with location and time metadata
Building project management dashboards with animated card interactions
Creating interactive resource directories with hover states and reveal animations
ai_summary: Animated project cards component with smooth Framer Motion transitions for hover, expand, and reveal interactions. Features a clean card layout displaying project title, hourly rate, payment status, categories, description, location, and time metadata with a professional minimalist aesthetic suitable for freelancer platforms, SaaS dashboards, or project marketplaces.
